text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: After Mejiro Ryan and I return from an outing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Feels like we just went out, but it's already dark.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They always say time flies when you're having fun,
and I had a great time!
choice_data_list: Sounds like it was a good break then.
Sounds like it was a good break then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I even lost track of the time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks again!
choice_data_list: We'll do it again, whenever you need it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Ooh, yeah! You got a deal!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heh...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Oh, I'm okay! Nothing's wrong...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's just... Um! C-could we maybe continue our
break a little longer?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
There's this place near school that has an amazing
view!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry if it's asking too much for you to come
along...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
But thanks to you, I really feel like I can take a
load off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Haha, it's not that I'm worried about anything. I
just thought it'd be nice to do what I can while
there's time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm racing toward my future goals fast, so I should
get the most out of a day off!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And recently, I've realized that hanging out with
you is just as important.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Taking a break helps put my thoughts in order
when I'm thinking about races too much...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And when we're together, I can feel the faith that
you have in me. It gives me even more
confidence!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that I've got your support... That lets me
run without any worries.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So that's why days off with you are super
essential!
choice_data_list: Okay. Let's hang out a little longer today.
Our time together is important to me too.
Okay! Let's hang out even more from now on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
So that's why days off with you are super
essential!
choice_data_list: Okay. Let's hang out a little longer today.
Our time together is important to me too.
Okay! Let's hang out even more from now on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Thank you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
All right. Let's stay here, even if it's just a little
longer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Hey, look! That's the evening star!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Heading into the mountains to look at the stars
might be a fun thing to do next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spend my break with Mejiro Ryan until it's
completely dark outside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Really?
choice_data_list: Yeah. I get to learn so many things about you.
Yeah. I get to learn so many things about you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Heh... You're gonna make me blush.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
You know, some things I know I can be proud of,
but there are also things I'm not so sure about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And I want you to know all of them. I think that'll
give us a better connection.
choice_data_list: You can always talk to me.
You can always talk to me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Thanks so much!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The trust between Mejiro Ryan and me grows
even stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, really?! 'Cause there are so many places I'd
like to go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
We could kayak down the river, swim in the
ocean, go mountain climbing...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I need to train my body even more! And while I
do, you can get in on the action too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And like that, our mutual trust—and my workout
time—increases.
